meaning: n.[妞峕铔囪憽钀勫睘妞嶇墿,缇庡浗钄撹棨
examples: Objective: to study the inhibitory effect of ampelopsis on melanoma.
The purification method and crystallization shape of ampelopsis flavones were studied.
This paper studied the antioxidation of polysaccharide fraction AGP-3 from Ampelopsis Grossedentata in vitro.
Perhaps underneath its glorious Ampelopsis creeper, that famous clocktower is actually constructed of ivory.
